area.value: one willing living creature per three levels, no two of which may be more than 30 ft. apart

description.value: Each affected creature gains a +2 morale bonus to Strength and Constitution, a +1 morale bonus on Will saves, and a -2 penalty to AC. The effect is otherwise identical with a barbarian’s rage except that the subjects aren’t fatigued at the end of the rage. Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder Roleplaying Game Core Rulebook.
